title: こども交通教室をお手伝い！

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hello, little ones! Today we're going to teach you
all about traffic rules!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Take a good look over there. It looks like
those other Umamusume teachers are playing tag.
Now look very carefully, okay?

text_block_list.name: Doubtful Child
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure they're teachers? They're really
small! As small as me!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Grr... I ain't dat small!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And I'm trying to become a mature woman, so
why am I playing the kid role?! This is lame!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I do want some answers from the casting
department... but remember, this is for the
kiddos. We need to tough it out!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm over here! Ehehe, you're no match for my
evasive maneuvers!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: W-wait... Oh, no! Watch out!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Rrrraaagh! Get outta da way!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Eeeek!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear! Those two almost crashed into each
other! Umamusume can't make sudden stops when
they're running, so make sure you don't rush out
in front of them!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
But my mom says you should never run at full
speed outside!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Umamusume should only go all out in
certain places. Yer a good girl for followin' her
advice!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Do you all know about Umamusume lanes that
roads have? They're special lanes where
Umamusume can run at full speed. Be absolutely
sure not to stumble into those lanes, okay?

text_block_list.name: Young Boy
text_block_list.text:
So we just have to look both ways before we cross
an Umamusume lane, right?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Not only then—a running Umamusume is
dangerous wherever she is! Just take a look over
there.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Come on, Trainer! Hurry it up!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Eek?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crash! Thump, clatter...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whoa! What a crazy crash!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm sorry! It's all my fault! I... I only ever bring
misfortune!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
...Nah, this is all part of the show. Look, Trainer's
totally fine.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
See? Even when Umamusume aren't runnin' at full
speed, we're still real fast. And we're stronger
than we look, ya know. Even if a grown-up
stepped out in front of us, they'd get sent flyin'!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Never jump out in front of a running Umamusume.
And growing Umamusume must always be aware
of their surroundings while running. Make sure
you follow these rules!

text_block_list.name: The Children
text_block_list.text: 'Kaaay!
